Title: Hikaru no Go
Actors: Tomoko Kawakami, Sam Vincent, Susumu Chiba
Plot: A sixth-grader Hikaru Shindo accidentally awakens the spirit of a deceased Go prodigy Fujiwara no Sai who then accompanies Hikaru and helps him develop his Go skills.
Language: English, French, Cantonese, Korean, Spanish, Tagalog, Mandarin, Chinese, Japanese
